since_last: 53% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.61%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.64% · BTC +0.65% · Gold +0.14% · Nasdaq100 +0.47%. 53% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.61%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.61%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.59%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +6.20%, GOOGL +4.56%, VST +4.28%, WDAY +4.24%. Laggards: IBM -25.64%, DELL -12.64%, CSCO -5.65%, ANET -5.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.24% at $136.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.24% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
